text: 10.6g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

the upsides first: very available and cheap. that is about the only practical argument it has. use case can matter more than macros. this category is really about function and trade-offs. sometimes makes sense in a narrow use case. context matters more here than raw nutrient purity.

on the weaker side: liquid sugar is a brutal downside. this is almost the exact kind of misc item the category should bury. basically no useful nutrition. it gives up nutritional value while still costing calories. easy to oversell beyond what the numbers support. misc items often attract exaggerated narratives.
D tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
